message:
feat(c_interop): Generic C extension import system for numpy/pandas

- Fix c_interop.zig imports to use src/ prefix for sqlite3/zlib/ssl
- Rewrite loadExtensionModule for Zig 0.15 compatibility
- Skip C extension modules in import alias generation
- Add tryLoadVenvVersion and tryLoadMiseInstall helpers
- Support Python 3.8-3.13 across virtualenv, homebrew, framework, mise

C extensions now compile successfully.
